# Security Policy

Open Genome handles sensitive local genome data. Please report vulnerabilities privately before opening public issues.

## Supported Versions

Only the latest GitHub release and current `main` branch are supported for security fixes during early development.

| Version | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| Latest release | Yes |
| `main` | Yes |
| Older releases | No |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Use GitHub private vulnerability reporting:

https://github.com/Jakeelamb/genome_os/security/advisories/new

Please include:

- Affected commit, release, or workflow.
- Reproduction steps.
- Whether user genome data, local file paths, credentials, or downloaded resources are exposed.
- Any suggested mitigation.

Do not include private genome data in a report. Use synthetic paths and test files whenever possible.
